# Resa Leznoff

HR Corporate & Hospital Optimization Leader | Passionate about People & Culture | Strategically Cultivating High-Performing Teams and Driving Organizational Growth | AI Technology

Human Resources Generalist (Energy Performance Solar Energy) at 15 lightyears

Greater Orlando (US)

500 connections • 960 followers

## About

🌟 Join Our Team! 🌟 We are Hiring! Apply Today: WWW.15lightyears.com * Administrative Coordinator (On-Site: Longwood, FL) ______________________________________________________________________________ ABOUT ME: I believe HR is more than a function, it’s the heart of an organization. With a strong foundation in HR Operations (Corporate & Hospitals) I’ve built a successful career at the intersection of leadership, healthcare and science. My deep passion for medicine and science has always driven me to explore innovative solutions while also empowering teams and advancing scientific knowledge. I strive to bridge the gap between clinical practice and organizational strategy to create meaningful, sustainable impact. A trusted advisor to Operations, C-suite executives, and Physicians alike, committed to cultivating resilient and high-performing teams in scientific innovation. I’m passionate about creating a positive company culture! EDUCATION: Holding several degrees in from the University of Central Florida with several Human Resources certifications and specialized expertise in: * Strategic Human Resources Leadership * People Management & Culture * Benefits and Compensation * HR Policy Development, Compliance, Audits * Total Employee Rewards * Succession Planning * Talent Management * HR Data Analytics * Training HR & Medical Teams in: Tableau, SalesForce, Recruiting CRM's, Hospital CRMs & Platforms

Total Experience: 11 years and 9 months

## Experience

### Human Resources Generalist (Energy Performance Solar Energy) at 15 lightyears (Current)

Jul 2024 - Present • 1 year and 2 months

Company: 51-200 employees • Founded 2016 • Privately Held • Construction

### Hospital Human Resources Manager (Hospital Clinical Scientific IT) at National Hospital System (Corporate Office)

Jan 2014 - Jul 2024 • 10 years and 6 months

Texas and Florida

Strategic Operational HR Manager to leadership across key pillars of the healthcare enterprise, including stakeholders, board of directors, patient care services, biomedical research, and clinical informatics. Responsible for aligning human capital initiatives with the organizational mission to advance evidence-based care, scientific discovery, and digital health innovation. Collaborating with Hospital Operations and Department Managers, leaders to support workforce planning, talent development, organizational effectiveness, HR policy development initiative and change management. results.title: Rippling AI: Built to Do the Work, Not Just Talk About It | Rippling
results.text:
Rippling AI: Built to Do the Work, Not Just Talk About It | Rippling

Blog

- Company

# Rippling AI: Built to Do the Work, Not Just Talk About It

Author

Author

The Rippling Team

Published

March 18, 2026

Read time

Read time

5 MIN

In this article

Why Rippling AI is different

You’ll probably never build a report yourself again

It takes the tedious work off your plate

It can handle employee questions instantly

Get access to Rippling AI

Today we’re introducing Rippling AI. It’s AI that you can trust to answer deeply specific questions about your company using live data, and then take real action across HR, IT, and Finance.

Most enterprise AI products today are built as thin conversational layers on top of existing software. They may be able to retrieve information or generate a plausible response, but they are not deeply integrated with the underlying data model, business logic, permissions, and workflows of the system itself. When dealing with critical business information, that level of integration is not optional, it’s required.

## Why Rippling AI is different

It returns exact answers, not educated guesses. When you ask Rippling AI a question, it will express the action you want to take, in code. It writes a query. It generates precise SQL, or writes a formula, or builds a report. This approach creates inherent protections against hallucinations, and means that Rippling’s AI rides the tidal wave of investment the underlying foundation model companies have made in code generation. It also means the answers you get back are auditable and deterministic. Rippling’s AI shows its work, and you can verify the approach it’s taking.

It understands your organization. References like “my team” or “last quarter” resolve against your actual data: specific people, specific numbers, specific records. Ambiguous references to departments, candidates, work locations, and names are resolved up-front (“Which John do you mean?”)

Permissions are automatic. Rippling AI inherits your existing roles and access permissions. A manager sees their team. An HR admin sees more. You cannot trust LLMs to filter or redact data correctly, based on your company’s permissions model – but with Rippling, you don’t have to, because the LLM can only access information that the user it’s chatting with can access themselves. If you instruct the LLM to make changes on your behalf, it will tee them up for your review. And these changes will go through whatever approvals your company requires, the same as if they were made by a human.

Play video6:52

## You’ll probably never build a report yourself again

Rippling AI can build reports in one-shot, and run SQL analysis off of your data in Rippling. For example, let's say you want to create a report of voluntary terminations over the last 6 years. Simply write a prompt, and instead of hours of manual analysis, you get

results.title: Rippling AI: HR, Payroll and IT Automation | Rippling
results.text:
Rippling AI: HR, Payroll and IT Automation | Rippling

# AI that isn’t all talk

Unlock business-critical insights and delegate tedious tasks to AI built for HR, Payroll, IT, and Finance.

Request access

Play video6:52

## Ask anything. Do everything.

Rippling AI is powered by your live data and permissions, so it has the full context needed to complete your most complex tasks accurately.

### Make better decisions, with a complete view of your business

Build complex charts and graphs instantly

Watch AI find data, run analyses, and build verifiable, editable, and shareable reports.

Get deep, accurate, entire-business insights

Natively built on your HR, finance, and IT data, Rippling AI connects dots no other tools can.

Let employees self-serve simple questions

Employees can see personalized pay, benefits, and policy explanations—without pinging HR.

### Pass off all your tedious tasks to AI

Turn large spreadsheets into fast action

Drag in bonuses for payroll, and AI will map the data, flag issues, get your approval, and execute the command—in over 185 countries.

Run advanced workflows in just a few words

Finish complex tasks like onboarding instantly. Forget clicking through screens and systems.

Fix messy data without manual work

Correct job titles, old department names, and more at scale easily—with simple prompts and your confirmation.

### Save time with AI you can trust to run accurately and securely

Check its answers in real time

In each response, numbers and names appear as clickable links to real records, so you can quickly see where answers come from.

Use built-in security and permissions

Rippling AI runs on your existing permissions, so employees never see data they shouldn't.

Always stay in control

Before it takes action, it gets your approval, so your critical tasks never go off course.

## AI that works across your entire business

Rippling AI helps your whole company make better decisions, finish busy work instantly, and get complex tasks done right the first time.

For HR

For Finance

For IT

Play video4:49

Offload routine HR questions

Let employees self-serve pay answers, benefits, and policies without disturbing your team.

Answer executive questions in seconds

Build shareable, cited reports on headcount, hiring, and comp to inform strategic decisions.

Make your busy work disappear

Instantly run admin tasks, like data updates and off-cycle pay runs, so you can focus on strategy.

Play video2:59

Track plan vs. actual with live data

See payroll and spend in seconds using live data across HR, payroll, and finance.

Explain variances fast

Drill into the "why" behind changes, like headcount vs. plan, hiring pipeline trends, and line-item spend.

Catch surprises early

Highlight outliers and drivers of spend, like travel and software, before they impact budgets.

Play video3:50

Run onboarding in one place

See who's starting, what's shipped, and what

results.title: Rippling AI for HR & Recruiting: Essential FAQs on Features, Pricing & ROI - Best AI HR Source
results.text:
Rippling AI for HR & Recruiting: Essential FAQs on Features, Pricing & ROI - Best AI HR Source 

Menu

## Is Rippling the Right AI-Powered HR Platform for You?This 2-Minute Quiz Reveals Your Perfect Match!

1

2

3

4

What is your current company size?

1-10 employees

11-500 employees500+ employees

Previous Next

### Key Takeaways

- Unified Workforce Platform: Rippling consolidates HR, IT, Finance, and Recruiting into one system, eliminating disconnected tools and serving as a central HRIS with AI-powered automation for the entire employee lifecycle.
- AI Recruiting Capabilities: Features include AI resume parsing with match scoring, AI-generated job descriptions, meeting assistant for interview transcription, and workflow automation that connects recruiting to onboarding and IT provisioning.
- Flexible HRIS & PEO Options: Rippling functions as both an HRIS (you remain employer of record) and offers optional PEO services (co-employer arrangement) for businesses needing different levels of administrative support and compliance management.
- Ideal for Growing Companies: Best suited for small to mid-sized companies (10-500 employees) experiencing rapid growth, with modular pricing starting at $8 PEPM base plus additional module costs (typically $20-35 PEPM total).
- Enterprise Security & Compliance: SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant with granular access controls, encryption, and comprehensive data protection features for handling sensitive employee and candidate data.

Rippling is a unified workforce management platform that combines HR, IT, Finance, and Recruiting into a single system of record.

Designed to replace multiple disconnected tools, it serves as a central HRIS (Human Resource Information System) with integrated modules for payroll, benefits, and applicant tracking.

Rippling’s AI capabilities are embedded deeply into its workflows to automate administrative tasks, streamline recruiting, and unlock data-driven insights throughout the employee lifecycle. For those exploring Best 10 Core HR & HRIS Automation solutions, Rippling represents a comprehensive approach to workforce management.

## What is Rippling, and how does it use AI for HR and recruiting?

In recruiting, Rippling uses AI for:

- AI-Powered Resume Parsing and Candidate Ranking: Rippling currently offers AI-based resume parsing that automatically extracts candidate information and generates an AI match score indicating how well applicants meet job criteria. This speeds up screening by highlighting top candidates early in the funnel and reduces manual review workloads.
- AI-Generated Job Descriptions: It helps HR teams craft optimized job postings by analyzing roles and suggesting keyword-rich language that attracts quality applicants.
- AI Meeting Assistant: Rippling’s AI meeting assistant records, transcribes, and summarizes video interviews, enabling hiring managers to quickly review key moments, extract insights, and preserve candidate evaluations
